title: Extension Eval Fixture
description: A single evaluation case for an extension capability.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this eval case.

prompt.description: The user prompt that triggers this evaluation.

must_include.description: Strings that must appear in the output.

must_not_include.description: Strings that must not appear in the output.

required_tools.description: MCP tool names that must be called during evaluation.
